---
title: 'The Acrobat, by Bob Hamp: Story Structure'
date: '2016-04-06T11:18:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '1081592431935937417'
blogger_filename: '/2016/04/the-acrobat-by-bob-hamp-story-structure.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Story Structure'
  - 'The Acrobat'
---

<br />
Set Up<br />
The boy is accidentally left behind, and adopted by someone not of his own kind.<br />
<br />
<br />
Inciting Event<br />
The Circus is in town, and he meets his real parents. He decides to go with them.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Plot Point<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Plot Point<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Plot Point<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Plot Point<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Plot Point<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Climax<br />
He's able to do Acrobatics Effortlessly, impressing even his own kind.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Resolution<br />
He meets his adopted parents again, and they see what he was made for.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
*
